name: Harvard Collection Services
description_short: Harvard Collection Services is a debt relief provider based in Chicago, Illinois. Rated 1.4/5 with 102 Google reviews, reflecting limited customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Harvard Collection Services is a debt relief provider serving clients in Chicago, Illinois. With 102 Google reviews and a 1.4/5.0 rating, Harvard Collection Services has built a significant presence in the local debt relief market.

Harvard Collection Services specializes in debt relief services designed to help consumers manage and reduce their outstanding debts. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Debt relief services in Chicago can range from debt management plans to settlement negotiations. Harvard Collection Services should be evaluated based on their fee structure, success rate, and how their program may affect your credit score. Legitimate debt relief providers are typically registered with the state, and consumers should verify credentials and check for complaints with the CFPB and state attorney general before enrolling in any program.

Consumers in the Chicago, Illinois area who are considering Harvard Collection Services should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any debt relief provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
